MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Marylebone'}) RETURN s.id, s.location
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE p.email = 'john.doe@example.com' RETURN t.id, t.status, p.name
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE s.name = 'Waterloo' RETURN tr.train_number
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE i.timestamp > datetime('2025-01-01') RETURN r.route_id, count(i) AS incident_count
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:MAINTAINED_FOR]->(tr:Train) WHERE tr.id = 'TRN-001' RETURN m.log_date, m.maintenance_type
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:WORKS_AT]->(d:Depot) WHERE d.depot_name = 'Euston Depot' RETURN sm.name, sm.role
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:HAS_CARDS]->(p:Passenger) RETURN tc.card_number, tc.expiry_date, p.passenger_id
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE ts.route_id = 'RTE-LON-MAN' RETURN ts.date, SUM(ts.quantity) AS total_sold
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:DEPARTED_FROM]->(s:Station {city: 'London'}) RETURN j.journey_id, j.departure_time
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.id = 'TKT-12345' SET t.status = 'CANCELLED', t.cancelled_at = datetime() RETURN t.status
MATCH (dp:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dp.log_date < date('2024-01-01') DELETE dp RETURN count(dp) AS deleted_records
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE p.country = 'UK' RETURN r.route_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS unique_passengers
MATCH (s:Station)-[:SERVED_BY]->(tr:Train) WHERE tr.speed_limit > 100 RETURN s.name, avg(tr.speed_limit) AS average_speed
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:BELONGS_TO_DEPOT]->(d:Depot {depot_name: 'Paddington'}) RETURN tr.train_number, d.depots
OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HOLDS_TRAVEL_CARD]->(tc:TravelCard) RETURN p.name, tc.card_number
MATCH (ms:StaffMember)-[:REPORTED]->(i:Incident) WHERE ms.role = 'Station Manager' RETURN ms.name, i.incident_type, i.severity_level
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time >= datetime('2025-06-01') AND j.departure_time <= datetime('2025-06-30') RETURN t.price, j.journey_id
MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:CONNECTED_TO]->()-[:CONNECTED_TO]->(ss:Station) RETURN s.name, collect(ss.name) AS connecting_stations
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:DEPARTED_FROM]->(s:Station) WHERE s.city = 'Manchester' RETURN s.name, count(j) AS daily_journeys, AVG(j.duration_minutes) AS avg_duration

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey), (j)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH r, sum(t.fare_amount) AS total_revenue, count(t) AS total_tickets,count(CASE WHEN p.passenger_type = 'Concession' THEN 1 END) AS concession_count RETURN r.route_id, total_revenue, (100.0 * concession_count / total_tickets) AS concession_pct, total_tickets
MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s.name, s.city, s.country ORDER BY s.name ASC LIMIT 20
MATCH (t:Train {status: 'In Service'}) RETURN t.train_number, t.capacity, t.type
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.age >= 18 AND p.age <= 65 RETURN p.passenger_id, p.email, p.phone
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departure_time > datetime('2026-03-25') RETURN j.journey_id, t.ticket_type
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.severity_level = 'High' OR i.severity_level = 'Critical' RETURN i.incident_id, i.description, i.timestamp
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:HOUSES]->(tr:Train) RETURN d.depots_name, collect(tr.train_number) AS trains_stored
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:WORKS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE sm.shift_start < datetime('2026-03-25T08:00:00') RETURN sm.name, s.name, sm.role
MATCH (tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.expiry_date > date('2026-12-31') RETURN tc.card_number, tc.zone_covered, tc.price
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE ts.revenue > 10000 RETURN ts ORDER BY ts.revenue DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.status = 'Delayed' RETURN j.journey_id, j.scheduled_departure, j.actual_departure
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:MAINTAINED_FOR]->(tr:Train) WITH tr, count(m) AS maintenance_count RETURN tr.train_number, maintenance_count ORDER BY maintenance_count DESC
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.fare_amount > 50 RETURN p.name, t.fare_amount, t.purchase_date
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE r.distance_km > 200 RETURN r.route_name, r.distance_km, r.average_duration_minutes
MATCH (s:Station)-[:SERVED_BY]->()-[:DEPARTED_TO]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.status = 'Completed' RETURN s.name, COUNT(j) AS completed_journeys
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.is_refundable = true AND t.refund_status = 'Pending' RETURN t.id, t.purchase_date, t.amount
OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN p.name, t.id
MATCH (dp:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dp.station = 'Victoria' AND dp.date = date('2026-03-25') RETURN dp.inbound_count, dp.outbound_count, dp.net_change
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE i.resolution_status = 'Resolved' RETURN r.route_name, count(i) AS resolved_incidents
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE s.zone = 'Zone 1' RETURN tr.train_number, count(s) AS stops_in_zone_1
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.country_of_residence IN ['UK', 'USA', 'France'] RETURN p.passenger_id, p.country_of_residence, p.membership_tier
MATCH (t:TicketSalesSummary)-[:REPORTS_ON]->(r:Route) WHERE t.sales_volume > 500 RETURN r.route_id, SUM(t.sales_volume) AS total_sales
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.maintenance_cost > 1000 RETURN m.log_id, m.train_id, m.cost, m.maintenance_type
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE EXISTS { (s)-[:CONNECTED_TO]->() } RETURN s.name, COUNT { (s)--() } AS connection_count
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:DEPARTED_FROM]->(s:Station) WHERE s.region = 'South East' RETURN s.region, COUNT(DISTINCT j.origin) AS origins
MATCH (sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.employment_status = 'Active' AND sm.salary < 40000 RETURN sm.staff_id, sm.salary, sm.department
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:USED_BY]->(p:Passenger) WHERE tc.card_type = 'Monthly' RETURN tc.card_number, p.passenger_type
MATCH (tr:Train) WHERE tr.year_manufactured < 2015 RETURN tr.train_number, tr.year_manufactured, tr.model
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route), (r)-[:CONNECTED_STATION]-(s:Station) RETURN r.route_name, collect(DISTINCT s.name) AS connected_stations
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.purpose IN ['Business', 'Leisure'] RETURN t.purpose, COUNT(t) AS ticket_count
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:REPORTED_BY]->(sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.staff_role = 'Signal Engineer' RETURN sm.name, count(i) AS reported_incidents
MATCH (s:Station) WITH s MATCH (s)-[:SERVED_BY]->(tr:Train) WHERE tr.speed_limit > 120 RETURN s.name, MAX(tr.speed_limit) AS max_speed
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.duration_minutes >= 30 AND j.duration_minutes <= 90 RETURN j.journey_id, j.duration_minutes, j.status
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HOLDS_DAILY_PASS]->(dp:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dp.active = true RETURN p.passenger_id, dp.log_date, dp.zone_accessed
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:BELONGS_TO_DEPOT]->(d:Depot) WHERE d.location CONTAINS 'London' RETURN d.depot_name, count(tr) AS train_count
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.destination CONTAINS 'Manchester' RETURN t.ticket_id, j.destination, t.price
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:CONDUCTED_BY]->(sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.specialization = 'Brake Systems' RETURN sm.name, count(m) AS maintenance_performed
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:EXPIRES_IN]->(days) WHERE days > 365 RETURN tc.card_number, days, tc.validity_period_months
MATCH (tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.days > 365 RETURN tc.card_number, tc.days AS days, tc.validity_period_months
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.fare_class = 'First Class' AND j.busyness_level > 80 RETURN j.journey_id, j.busyness_level, j.fare_amount

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WITH p, count(DISTINCT j) AS journey_count WHERE journey_count > 5 RETURN p.name, journey_count ORDER BY journey_count DESC LIMIT 25
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE s.city = 'Birmingham' RETURN t.train_number
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.status = 'Active' AND p.last_login > datetime('2026-03-20') RETURN p.passenger_id, p.email
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.validation_status = 'Unvalidated' RETURN t.id, t.journey_id, t.valid_until
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.estimated_arrival < datetime() AND j.status <> 'Completed' RETURN j.journey_id, j.eta_delay_minutes
MATCH (d:Depot) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:HOUSES]->(tr:Train) RETURN d.depots_name, count(tr) AS trains_count
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:SUPERVISES]->(depot:Depot) RETURN sm.name, depot.depot_name, sm.level
MATCH (tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.zone_count >= 6 RETURN tc.card_number, tc.monthly_fee, tc.zone_list
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary) WITH ts ORDER BY ts.date DESC LIMIT 30 RETURN ts.route_id, SUM(ts.revenue) AS weekly_revenue
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.cancellation_reason IS NOT NULL RETURN j.journey_id, j.cancellation_reason, j.refund_amount
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.status = 'Scheduled' AND m.scheduled_date > date('2026-03-26') RETURN m.log_id, tr.train_number, m.type
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.amount >= 20 RETURN DISTINCT p.name, COUNT(t) AS tickets_bought
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE r.frequency_per_hour > 4 RETURN r.route_name, r.max_frequency, r.operator
MATCH (s:Station)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) WHERE p.accessibility_features CONTAINS 'Wheelchair' RETURN s.name, count(p) AS accessible_platforms
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.scan_location IS NULL SET t.scanned_at = datetime() RETURN t.id
OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HOLDS_TRAVEL_CARD]->(tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc IS NONE RETURN p.name, 'No Travel Card'
MATCH (dp:DailyPassengerLog) RETURN dp.station AS station, SUM(dp.inbound + dp.outbound) AS total_traffic ORDER BY total_traffic DESC
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WITH i, r WHERE i.cost_to_resolve > 5000 RETURN r.route_name, MAX(i.cost_to_resolve) AS max_cost
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:SERVES]->(s:Station) WHERE tr.service_type = 'High Speed' RETURN tr.train_number, collect(s.name) AS stations_served
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.membership_years > 5 RETURN p.passenger_id, p.name, p.tier
MATCH (t:TicketSalesSummary)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(r:Route) RETURN r.route_id, AVG(t.revenue) AS avg_daily_revenue
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.component CONTAINS 'Engine' OR m.component CONTAINS 'Gearbox' RETURN m.log_id, m.maintenance_type, m.technician
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE EXISTS { (s)-[:CONNECTED_TO]-() } RETURN s.name, [node IN collect(s.connected) | node.name] AS connections LIMIT 50
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:DEPARTED_FROM]->(s:Station) WHERE s.region = 'Scotland' RETURN s.region, COUNT(j) AS journeys_from_region
MATCH (sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.contract_type = 'Temporary' RETURN sm.staff_id, sm.department, sm.contracts_end
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:EXPIRED_BEFORE]->(days) RETURN tc.card_number, tc.expiry_date, days
MATCH (tr:Train) WHERE tr.fuel_type = 'Electric' RETURN tr.train_number, tr.energy_consumption_kwh_km
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route), (r)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(co:Company) RETURN co.company_name, COUNT(DISTINCT j) AS total_journeys
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.pnr_code IS NOT NULL RETURN t.ticket_id, t.pnr_code, t.airline_partner
MATCH (i:Incident) WITH i, collect(i.affected_passengers) AS passengers UNWIND passengers AS p RETURN i.incident_id, size(p) AS affected_count
MATCH (s:Station) WITH s MATCH (s)-[:SERVED_BY]->(tr:Train) RETURN s.name, MAX(tr.departures_per_day) AS max_departures
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.priority_class = 'Emergency' RETURN j.journey_id, j.reason_priority, j.created_at
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HOLDS_DAILY_PASS]->(dp:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dp.usage_count > 10 RETURN p.passenger_id, dp.log_date, dp.usage_count
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:BEING_SERVICED]->(d:Depot) WHERE tr.maintenance_due_date < date('2026-03-30') RETURN tr.train_number, d.depots_name, tr.next_maintenance
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.delay_duration_minutes > 30 RETURN t.price, j.delay_duration_minutes, j.reason
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.completed_before > date('2020-01-01') AND m.archived = true DELETE m RETURN count(*) AS archived_deleted
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.population_served > 100000 RETURN s.name, s.population_served, s.metropolitan_area
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:REFUNDED_AS]->(rf:RefundRecord) RETURN p.name, rf.refund_amount, rf.processing_time_days
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:BELONGS_TO_DEPOT]->(d:Depot) WITH d, count(tr) AS train_count WHERE train_count > 50 RETURN d.depots_name, train_count
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.occupancy_percentage > 90 RETURN j.journey_id, j.occupancy_percentage, j.assigned_train_number
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)-[:ISSUED_IN]->(country) RETURN country, COUNT(tc) AS cards_issued, AVG(tc.credit_limit) AS avg_credit
